name: Card
purpose: Groups related content into a reusable surface with design-system spacing, border, and elevation rules.
whenToUse: Use to group related information or actions into a single semantic surface.
Use the provided CardHeader, CardContent, and CardFooter slots to keep layouts predictable.
whenNotToUse: Do not use Card as a generic spacing wrapper when Box or Stack is enough.
Do not add ad hoc borders and shadows around custom frames when Card variants already cover the surface need.
accessibilityRequirements: Ensure grouped content remains readable in both light and dark themes.
Provide accessible labels on interactive elements placed inside the card.
Do not use Card as the only cue for hierarchy; maintain heading and body structure.
